output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P522 wd:Q121783 ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
